post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_name
post_call_analysis_data.description: The caller's full name as they gave it.

post_call_analysis_data.name: callback_number
post_call_analysis_data.description: Best callback number in E.164 or readable format.

post_call_analysis_data.name: service_type
post_call_analysis_data.description: Which cleaning service they're interested in, if known.

post_call_analysis_data.name: property_details
post_call_analysis_data.description: Property type and size, e.g. '3 bed 2 bath house' or '1200 sqft office'.

post_call_analysis_data.name: service_address_or_area
post_call_analysis_data.description: Address or neighborhood where service would happen.

post_call_analysis_data.name: special_notes
post_call_analysis_data.description: Pets, allergies, access codes, products to avoid, focus areas, etc.

post_call_analysis_data.name: urgency
post_call_analysis_data.description: How soon the caller wants a follow-up.

post_call_analysis_data.name: requires_human_followup
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if the call needs a human to call back for any reason.
